{{Quote|I am Khiss -- investment advisor to the stars!|Khiss|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 18">[[Star Wars (1998) 18|''Star Wars'' (1998) 18]]</ref>}}
'''Khiss''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] investment advisor, who was present at the [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

Khiss and a client "who prefers to remain nameless" were on Nar Shaddaa to pursue new business opportunities. They were present at the Circus Horrificus show crashed by [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]], two members of the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]], who had tracked illegally bred [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] to the Circus.

When the Jedi demanded that the crime boss [[Gargonn]] close down the operation, the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] smuggler [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] bet that the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] mutated akks would kill the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi masters]] in fifteen mili-cycles. Khiss accepted the wager on behalf of his client. After the Jedi survived the allotted time, Khiss demanded that Grahrk pay up and revealed his unnamed client as a very angry [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]], fresh from his victory at the [[Vinta Harvest Classic/Legends|Vinta Harvest Classic]]

The investment advisor and his [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] client were later seen, along with most of the spectators involved in the bet, chasing the hapless Grahrk out of the arena.
